content: To read Genius: The game, To get more books related to AI stuff and techno fiction, I wanna to expand my imagination. Simple thought of more club work such as Leo Club, Cogni discussions on WhatsApp. I hate Leo messages because I don't belong there. Nothing actually drained me today, but a thought of getting again into that bhagambhag and rushed monotonous life of my college filled me with disgust and sudden feeling of unhappiness. Getting more assignments to copy-paste. I am not made to fit into the world, but to stand out more so on my own terms. Given a competition and rivalry, I can dig more deeper into my potential

I want to dance with more energy and vigor. I want some action when I watch something about how excising and its core are mixed up all in our whole system. I was more enthusiastic to get something really working. I want to make a drone in less price. I am going to learn how it works and do some manufacturing work in that. I love music and its effects on my brain, spirit, soul, and overall me. I started liking math and finance and accounting. I immediately want to get into a real-life business. I want some real action out of my brain and body cells coordinated. Talking to shit people. For example, the one I chatted on LinkedIn. Mia thought that if I won't complete my reading challenge, up with me. I want this energy to stay with me throughout my life. I want to tour the world. I want to read everything I could reach out to. I want to burn the Sun inside me to see the wonders of the world. I want to do cycling, skating, and also make drones.

To read about the struggles of building Nike during 1970s to connect with my roots, to know something more deeply. I took more interest in knowing, feeling what situation the person was going during a certain time and era. I wanted to take a respectable post in cognizen. For that, I was a bit nervous about the interview, but ultimately I overcame my fear. To make a good, long-lasting friendship, to talk with my best friend KK. I suppose yesterday I was very eager to get into physical acts like running and dancing, which I could not, spent a good morning. And that has caused me a bad morning routine and certainly an upset day. I slept a lot. I lost my usual energy. I will wake up early this morning. I want to travel the world. Now I started taking this communication skill very seriously and I realized it's key to human situation to build with someone, to build a rapport by meeting, spending time together, and understanding the other person. I learned beauty can be found anywhere. bas dekhane vali ki najar acchi honi chahiye. I realized telling a story and learning how to be connected to the roots of your soul is very necessary by listening to the story of Apjit Patil, who hails from a very humble background. I learned that building connections with the people who are close to you, for you, and they share many things and values. I learned how reading is more energetic than watching videos. I learned that whatever be the situation, morality should come first. I learned I should be self-independent. I learned I should start helping someone from wherever I am. I learned I should not make a parda or limitation to my, this, ki college jaake karungi and all. I should start connecting people at the very moment I am in right now. I learned that things are very beautiful if they are cherished from the deepest core of heart. I learned how beautiful a conversation or a person gets when he or she throws out all the elements of distraction and just focus and connect with the one thing at a time. I learned how much lucky I am that I have so much plenty of time at this age to work on my personality and readings. I learned the missing link between the way of dreaming big and at the same time being connected to your roots.

To wake up next morning with a deep insight of my people, land, and culture. To run at my maximum stamina and test my physique. To listen story of Angus Repartly complete, which I started yesterday, and connect the dots of his life to see what has made him, why growth chose him over others, because he was ready to grow. To discover various imaginative sides of my brain at work by listening to Les Misra, thinking how good he might be in storytelling and altogether his life skills, communication skills, bonding with people. He is with must be very strong to bring such a depth in his voice. I constantly think what makes a person, how things work the way they do, how certain situations still lingers in people's heart and affect the society in long run, how partition has made sour and bitter moments in between the countrymen, how one single decision can spoil the coming two, three generations. Muhammad Jinnah stamped his psychology on all the Muslims which is facing its consequence until today. I slept all through the day because I didn't slept yesterday. I sought sleep on time. Laziness filled and clogged my thought process, so my experience with the book on partition is a little blurry imagination. I want to cherish each and every word in my own way. I need to keep myself cool-headed, to sharpen my mental capabilities. For that, decrease distractions, sharpen your focus. Sleeping is not bad, but don't make yourself feel guilty for that. You want to savor each and every moment of your reality, of your reading experience. So increase focus, sharpen your imaginative skills. Love is the indispensable element of life. Savor it every day, every moment. You are the most beautiful soul, body, and person I know. For you are neutral, you can think of a person's situation without being biased. Some things to work on. Speed up your reading. Try to be more into present, for it is once in a lifetime opportunity. Do grab it. Savor the beauty scattered and love surrounding you. Be more and more focused. Be true to your heart, your soul, your self, inner voice.

Maybe getting into the Hindu articles of all week, reading what's going around the world. I love reading newspapers, but I can't make it for daily. I need to make it a habit. To learn about a great persona I admire. By the way, today it's Tabsi Pannu. And to aspire and reach higher into my imagination real. To implement human psychology into real, like humans, likes emotions, mystery, fame, to be liked and known. So keep your mouth shut and play the game of a badass girl. Keep the mystery alive. Tell them only what they want to listen to keep them hooked. Don't reveal anything about yourself to anyone. Keep the chase alive. One more thing to be grounded to play with those you know well, and shut away random ins. You don't want short, you want deep and long-lasting conversations to make a high imprint on their mind, you are surrounded with. Today I was a bit lazy, uncapable to feel good. Music sets me free. So does my imagination. But let this all pour down on useful grounds and connect the dots. I love mystery and chase as in, as a series. It makes my mind work and find its rhythm. Sleep, some phonic distractions, more swings of period, a little doubt over my period overflow and clothes. I love to know what it is, how it works, and why does it work the way it does. This is all through curiosity. How can I keep that curiosity fuel more efficient? By thinking of problems and values things which rose my curiosity, to trigger more curiosity when I need to do yoga so that I could connect with myself more, increase my focus, reduce distraction, notifications, apps, unwanted people, make my position higher, be high-profile. Try to connect the dots till so far. Ditch unwanted details and give attention to which is more demanding. Brainy is the new sexy. You owe yourself a day off. Don't be so pushy in your expectations. It's all natural. There is nothing like genius, the game creator. It's there because people love to hear what they can only dream of. You need to change your hairstyle seriously. You need to work on this and make use of all the assets you have got. Everybody misses short, so why don't just play it short and simple, nano. And you will be going to more precise with details.

To find me. Be brainy. Make a good best friend in college. Reading Saadat Hasan Manto, which I realized is quite off time with respect to this time. I didn't find to get any relevant connection. To read out of our mind, play with chhota bachcha of mouse, to bath and feel fresh, to get a new hairstyle to suit on my upcoming personality. Some faulty Insta post and WhatsApp status. Get rid of these people and post, mute or unfollow them. Manto's stories which were beyond the real at some point and made me frustrated. I don't appreciate his thoughts, although his storytelling is good enough. I am losing balance by not quietly using my intellect up to the mark. My brain is cravings to get more problems, not good thoughts. It want action and is nearly loathing to get started on one. Find yourself bit by bit in all the books, situations and problems.

One hour dancing vigorously. Though I was excited to read third chapter of MTO. When I read it, crossed my head and I began feeling asleep. I read four Munfro's stories and all are just different. I experimented with gradient app and it somehow evoked many expressions. I need to change my hairstyle, it doesn't suit my personality. I loved my Mouse. I loved that age-old story of neurosurgeon but could not face it. It's often my deep thinking or excess thinking which never let me get started in the first place. You need to change your sleeping cycle because it drains most of your energy. You need to work on your external looks and personality for it handles most creative energy stores. Get on a new haircut and make your features strong.

Doing my exercise, spending some time with nature, quality time spent with my brothers and family. Watching so much discussion about me among my friends, I felt I exist kind of because I ignore the group mostly because people there are not concerned with me. But today I felt valued just randomly. Be led by the sun inside you to see the wonders of the world. I felt this quote getting lived in my permanent memory. It energized me. Instilled my faith on LOA, Law of Attraction, and found that anger, worry, and frustration can be put off by music. For it is kind of my alcohol. I made a playlist for my pop dance music so it gave me a large bits of happiness to get myself back. My sleep, slow reading pace, less healthy body, some social media, and less focus. I have started loving myself more and more as I am discovering myself each day. Be led by the sun inside you to see the wonders of the world is my favorite home mantra. Music is going to be your drug and water, its your alcohol. I love music single-handedly and water all the time.

Reading Heat Transfer from SP Sahte videos. Waking up early morning and doing my exercise, running, which further caused me leg pain and physical fatigue. Doing my yoga. Reading in the park a book about importance of physical movement or running and exercising. Watching the sunset. Listening my dance playlist music. Drinking lots and lots of water. Caring for my looks. Sleep. More running or maybe unscheduled running caused leg pain and physical exhaustion. Maybe I need to eat more and scheduled running on a regular one and daily scheduled. I was perfect in the very beginning in my childhood, when I was just led by curiosity and callings of my heart. When all the instruction came from within. I lost this by losing my self-confidence. Now work tirelessly to gain all the self-confidence you have lost since then.

To complete the book Spark, to learn HTO from SP Sukhatme, read more and more, and store it efficiently in my brain. To learn some aerobic exercises and practice aerobic dance with Shemaroo Bipasa Basu. To develop a mentally involved aerobics hobby which will suit me, example ballet dance. To get accustomed with online teaching materials and methods. What's strange is today I did not let anything hamper my energy. But by the end of the day, I realized mind somehow brings one or the other roadblocks. That is my crux. No need to let it come. I have attributed myself more to the words in the overcoming failure of JEE. Due to constant worry, I had stopped believing on myself. Now things which might have come naturally to me are taking enormous efforts from my side. Worry and depression only worsen the situation, Sneha. Never ever let a single one come in your way from now onwards. Exercise and aerobics can replace midday sleep very effectively.

Talking to my little brother and invoking curiosity in his mind through various natural examples of science like sunset and blue sky. To complete my HTO lecture of Professor S.P. Shukla. Now onwards, I will learn it from a single book and complete the proofs elements by my imagination and enthusiasm, not just to cram it up and vomit for the marks. To learn some new type of music, some web series-based music. To listen to Raghu Sir webinar interviews and be so clear and precise in my knowledge like him. Speak and act like him. To learn more about Tor browser and its uses, though I am too naive for it, I just downloaded a single book, Ikigai, through it. Read Ikigai, but it's still pending. Again, my body is maybe very weak or I am too tired for 11 a.m. and sleep and woke up at 1 p.m. All through the day, I felt body pain, maybe due to intense exercise and running. You learn things fast when you know or have a background idea of what's coming on your way forward. Use common sense, imagination to involve your mind more to it. Your listening power is amazing. Excel at it by imagining things from your own imagination.

Actually, today I only did things which I was expected to do. BOTW, I tried to read news of past seven days, but not enough out of there. Though, I did my FNC assignment myself from Google. Maybe it is just the overloading of tasks pending all through the week. For this, I will keep myself regular in reading newspaper and complete the HW the day it was assigned. Do all the things at the same instant when it is worrying me. Find a good source of entertainment so that it's entertaining and knowledgeable. Today, I enriched knowledge of only LGBTQW, male-female attraction, social norms for females. Basically, all turning to some or the other way, sex and how important your choice of partner and future is. Enough. I am fed up with these. No more, Sneha. Please. Personality is the most important factor which decides your elegance, attraction, and value. Carry it always uniquely. chase and process is important Keep it on. Being grounded will take you ahead in your life always. Love your local accent, boli, and apnapan, and be very rooted to the things associated with it. Every cell of your brain and heart want to connect together to bring a new sun and see the wonders. Let them be. When you see somehow your energy is low, here is the list of some easily going things to do. Listen to a good podcast. Reality is, you don't have any podcast or good books as such. Listen to good music which connect your deep emotions. Listen to some good speech by Raghuram Rajan sir, Oprah Winfrey interview, or any other good content. Choices is what matters at the end. Do aerobic dance. It is a little awkward that you are complaining of less energy and then draining the remaining energy in dancing. But it works, trust me. Sing songs if the place and situation allow. Watch Suits, Sherlock Holmes, start Breaking Bad or any other mind-engaging episodes of some other web series.

Suno stories of Amitabh Bachchan. Aerobic dance workout. Listening to songs along with such a cloudy weather. Reading something about singularity. Waking up late in the morning. Sleeping throughout the day. Less energy in my body, maybe some fever and fatigue taking its toll over me, or maybe lack of proper medicine guidance or motivation. Workout with dance and music always helps. Nature always helps in mood of time.

To learn about nanotechnology. To read more about singularity. To excel at dancing and be as confident, cheerful, glamorous as Deepika Padukone. To see the sunset. To sing and record my song. But sadly, it was not possible. I have lost my initial talent of singing, and I miss it badly, really Yesu. I am very, very sorry for my attitude in 2016 to 2017 towards my musical talent, which I neglected due to IIT JEE, and even cursed my musical voice myself. Now I have realized my mistake. God, please mujhe maaf kar dijiye. I cannot feel alive without singing out of my heart. I did not even make it for the third round of EB selection of ECell. It scares me that I have no well-known place in my college. I will die one day, and no one will talk about me or my deeds. I felt like I don't even exist. Body fatigue and lose mental focus. You have started again trying to get distracted by checking Social media so many times. Love people around you and let them know because hiding it is not valuing your opinion and the person's value. Two loss at one time, cannot take this. Initiate communication, maybe you are missing one of the most important person of your life.

To learn more about friendship and keeping up with a good relation, the importance of friends to be precise, to save one's career and choices. They are really like adding materials in our life. I played Buddo twice with Kammo and Rhea. Never read Kiss Your Best Friend. I read Never Kiss Your Best Friend, and through it, I realized my first-hand experience with alien and love was not a wastage of time. It invoked certain good characters within me. In the process, I found my true self. I found someone or maybe made a rough sketch of how or what kind of person deserves me. That is a very good thing. I did my dance session that energized me. I watched sunset. And now I realize the value of being in a position to save my Bttu's life through my words and works, as I talk to him. Maybe I am too unable to categorize what waste of time and what worth its price. But yeah, the marks of MTO did let me down more so, because I was not more than 27. The number of likes on one's first-year girl pic affected me.(Looks do matter). I gave these things much thought, and then came to know I don't want so much likes and comments, but still it has a negative effect on me. It's the small steps which ultimately make you. Be it your bad decision, failure, or any relation. With your thoughts, you can get to achieve anything. Just make good choice.

Read more about economic activities. Ponder over subjective questions like time and existence. Watch some out-of-box movie content after a long time. Started reading NCERT Microeconomics two chapters and one from Macroeconomics. Talking to Bittu about curiosity around us really give me a lot of energy deep down inside. I feel I can completely make him a big man. Clicked some sun pictures with mom, that do give a feeling like things are creatively funny at home too. Maybe self-doubt kills me more, but I have got over it. I am just getting started. Maybe I need to be quick a little bit so that I can adopt more qualitative content in a day. You really need and desperately want a direction to get started into facing the real world. Ordinary things can be more special. You have got yourself back. You have to mold up things more creatively for Maa and more curiously and enthusiastically for Deep.

Maybe to read the newspaper of all through the week for BOTW. To talk to SP, which was very short-lived and I did not disclose my name. He is too much settled to rise him or his hormones. How could he be so unaffected by the thrill and drama which I made up all over? Maybe for the interview of EB, I was too distressed. But I am not sure if I am going to get on the EB. I will try my best to get Gary Vee on the webinar. God, if you could bring any luck on that part. I was too distressed to read anything of deep thoughts, so I watched Hobbit Part 2. Maybe I am too impatient to highten up my marks and losing it kills me inside. Why am I unable to get good marks, Lord? Why? It affects my mood badly and kills my enthusiasm to work for it the next time. I should not loss anymore. All through the day, I kept checking on him. Why? So intrigued by a single message, why? I myself don't know. I am less social and the thoughts of not being good at making relationships or keeping them at your side has always made me realize I have failed somewhere. There are more Gold in the hearts and minds of the people than you could find on this Earth.

To eat warm food, paneer. I watched third part of Hobbit, but it stopped in the middle, then I switched to Lord of the Rings. I actually did not like the concept of major or its story at all. All I like was that there was some good qualities by Gandalf, which resonated with me. I posted some best smile pics of mine and it took long time. I won't post anything more on Instagram. I researched a lot about webinar and how to conduct one. I list out some great persons who I want to be on my webinar and messaged them. I read Secrets of Numbers, only 20 pages though. Maybe I have ruined my sleep schedule and need to sleep early at night to get complete sleep and to sleep in afternoon. I lose focus. I need to be more determined. I should not spend so long on my Insta post, nor should I stalk. I need to be more social and communicative. I need great determination to stay at one task or goal. If it keeps changing, my effort will all go in vain.

To learn more about stock exchange market and use it in real life, and set, to build my portfolio by going through some really useful content as of by the blog of Saswat Lenka. Complete the things that I have started and not just muddle up with so many things all at a time. Not actually drained my energy, but still it wasted a few hours on my yesterday's Instagram post. Refrain from post in future so quickly. I learned that in those three, four years, I have not updated my study patterns. I still rely on handbook when there is a substitute for it used by all. I need to get accompanied with tech even if I don't seek as my sole future writer. It's a necessary tool as English, and you cannot escape this. Finding right content on YouTube, right courses through expert advice, learn from the enthusiasm of V. Gaines and Saswat Lenka, also Debabrata Panigrahi of my batch.

To learn deeply and precisely about stock market, reading some blog written by my fellow batchmates and juniors. I expanded the view of mine on certain topics such as why prices of oil slide so drastically, how paradox happens, one about loyalty to our loved ones, one about the effects of this pandemic. Explored a bit of stock simulation. I also want to play the virtual game of investing and see if I could buy a new laptop and phone to me. Learned the lecture of CS50, lecture 1. I tried to resist the temptation to sleep or clear my mind using its motivation very easily, but surrounding does effect me. I sleep 3 hours in the afternoon time. And when I finished stock lecture 2, I was tempted by the good food. I lose my focus and motivation easily, practice persistence more. I can combine many things at a time to find a bigger pattern. I am adapting to new techniques, teaching methods, and concepts. CS, AI, nanobots, stock investing, singularity, economics, DNA modeling, finance. I am good at deducing the real analytics cause of why things are the way they are.

Going through Rachna ma'am's lecture and teaching myself stocks and its prerequisite. Reading about Singularity, but it did not get through my mind well enough. Increasing my reading speed, reducing time and increasing the quality of sleep I get. Reading some news and blogs, mostly related to helicopter money. Conducting the webinar with Bookstock entrepreneurs, talking to my good friends gave some sort of energy. Listening to Gary Vee podcast, it's really good, positive energy. Maybe I ate a little more and then felt tired or sleepy early at around 1:30. Woke up at 3:30. I spent more time on WhatsApp today. Rest things were okay. But I need to keep myself motivated more and more to eradicate ineffectiveness. You are in a very lucky time zone that you can access so many great lectures, talks, books at your fingertips. I felt high gratitude for the lectures of Rachna ma'am, for the talks of Gary Vee, and for the wise words of Ray Kurzweil throughout. Though I am still unable to crack the real gist out of the book Singularity is Near. I found importance of friends and family, of good neighbors, and society. That how the law of karma works, and good social connections, a little cuddle, hug, forehead kiss, a bit of closeness to bless your whole day with a new rhythm and love and energy. I found that ultimately it's love what really fills us or keeps us alive, or give us a reason to be alive. Love is all that every human craves. Connection, a true real human connection is what makes you stick to a video or a person on all social media platforms, or to the real person in front of you. Opportunities are widely distributed. It's you who need to get them, prepare yourself for it someday one. I found the greatest powers of humans, and also its weak points for them in terms of profitability. It's love. Your thoughts, the way you want to see the situation is so, so strong that you will not believe your mind. It's just mind-blowing at sorting out the things you want to learn or keep, or maybe whatever it is that you want. You just need to ask for it and keep walking or going at your maximum pace. Prioritize courses and things you want to learn, Gary Vee podcast daily for real energy, Rachna ma'am to gain income for the new phone and laptop, Singularity from Ray Kurzweil.

Gary Vee talk, Rachna Ranade, and then Ray Kurzweil, thoughts and work on singularity. I watched a documentary on singularity and it seemed they are very far to understand, to get a feel for it in one go. So I need to watch or listen to them again. I read certain blogs like one about Bill Gates on how his philanthropy is questioned because he has a bad temper and throw tantrums over his employees. What I think is one cannot ignore one's good aspect if they discover one of their bad points. It's just okay. We are all human and have our good and bad sides. It's just like how we are designed. I read about the JNV reforms and it filled me with energy for I have always wanted JNV to upgrade a little bit with technology. It's something which I felt from day one at JNV, but later on seeing no hope, I just settled and now I could see a major loss. I lag at technical upfront. I want to get Joe Ryan as my webinar speaker. I emailed him after doing a little bit of research. I am good at drawing by various thoughts which came to my mind. And I think I am good at it. I need to start a YouTube channel for the same, maybe soon. Instead of getting logical, I get emotional about singularity. And it made me thoughtful and sleepy. My mistake, I slept a lot. The day lacked friends and family bonds, so I felt less energetic. But later on, I get over it by playing Ludo with my friends. I only need one thing in abundance, persistent focus. Learn more and more about stocks to get money for your laptop and phone. Don't leave a single book unread on your bookself. Outsource ideas by talking more about ideas and playing it cool. Listen Gary Vee every day and learn from Rachna ranade every day. You need to strengthen your financial understanding. Research more about singularity and machine learning. Connect with more leaders and entrepreneurs by sending personal requests and emails.

Mark Metry, I found a feel of rescue and fulfillment watching his Instagram content. He seems someone who resembles my thoughts. I have gone through his various articles and they all seem to be good and all resonated my frequency at a higher note and give me a feel-good factor or good vibe. I felt a deep connection to leaders and want to strengthen my connection each day with a few people. Till so far I have got some good foreign contacts on my LinkedIn and it is reaching out to them every day via some media. I find out that I am very much perfect from day one. It's just I am never satisfied with myself. I also find that our mind know all the good things. It is just this body temp, distraction, fatigue, less energy which could not act on it. We never, we know what's best and what is not. Nothing is absolute, not it's your stupidity or slow reading pace. You know that you will get over it. I hear Rachna ma'am's Yes Bank analysis and realize how important corrections are to form a giant organization and how important cooperation and loyalty is to keep that giant organization intact. I hear Gary Vee and find the biggest mistake I have been making till date and that is I am less, I am not enough, without realizing I have the things which can make me whoever I want to be. I watched one tea with Gary Vee live and one building habits with Rachna Ranade. This suits better because my habits are already better from whatever I dream an ideal day starter pack. I read some tea page of The Intelligent Investor and I found my enthusiasm will not serve me any good and I need to balance my emotional reaction to a situation and handle it logically. More energy will lead to disaster. So I am trying to learn all wiser steps to be ready to test some of my skills in stocks and unstable market. I got my FFE amount of 5,000 but I am still in dilemma if I will get more of my semester fee or not. If I get another amount I will spend this 5,000 on stock market course of Rachna Ranade. Well, almost nothing will give my energy because now I spend my time wisely. Yeah, I do watch status and Bollywood content but that I feel help me to rejuvenate myself. It is an investment. I can increase my reading speed to learn stock market and make good notes of them. I can understand singularity if I would listen the video once again. I am going to be the most lovable person of my life. You are going to be the most ideal personality you have never wished to meet and is now I am making that personality of mine. I can increase my comprehension and understanding of the content, to bring some patterns and analytical connections between what you read.

Doing research with business terminologies and connecting with various dignitaries. I researched a lot. I delved deeper and deeper. I talked to Mark Metry on Instagram and read about him. It's a lot of energy wandering your mind around such content. I tried very hard to get Jorian Krainbrink to reply me, but I think he's thinking about money and just being professional. I like hustling and going through various media platforms to get a good deal. Nothing as such, but I felt bad for investing 10 minutes on ROF. It seems absurd at times and don't give me good vibe. I slept for three hours in afternoon time, from 3 to 6 p.m. That is too bad. Maybe I should stick to my 3 to 5 time and utilize one hour to my dancing regime. I watched status a lot, and that decreased my energy. I am enthusiastic to utilize online marketing platforms as were inspired a lot by Gary Vee. I value myself more because I know I do matter. I want to do entrepreneurship course via a three-course ERP package and will start complete, reached three courses this month. And maybe I can buy the same course by the time for my stock investing.
